name: legaciti-for-wp-admin
description: Legaciti WordPress Plugin Admin UI (Vite+ / Oxc — https://viteplus.dev / https://oxc.rs/)

scripts.build: rimraf ../assets/dist && vite build --config vite.wp-admin.mjs --mode dashboard && vite build --config vite.wp-admin.mjs --mode people && vite build --config vite.wp-admin.mjs --mode publications && vite build --config vite.wp-admin.mjs --mode errors && vite build --config vite.wp-admin.mjs --mode settings
scripts.watch:admin: cross-env LEGACITI_VITE_WATCH=1 concurrently -k -n dash,people,pubs,errors,settings "vite build --watch --config vite.wp-admin.mjs --mode dashboard" "vite build --watch --config vite.wp-admin.mjs --mode people" "vite build --watch --config vite.wp-admin.mjs --mode publications" "vite build --watch --config vite.wp-admin.mjs --mode errors" "vite build --watch --config vite.wp-admin.mjs --mode settings"
scripts.run:plugin: concurrently -k -n admin,reload "pnpm run watch:admin" "pnpm run watch:browser"
